title: LeWorldModel: Stable End-to-End Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture from Pixels
summary: LeWorldModel presents the first Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) that trains stably end-to-end directly from raw pixels using only two loss terms, eliminating the instabilities that have historically prevented pixel-level JEPA training. The resulting world model achieves competitive performance on downstream control tasks while running on a single GPU and planning approximately 48 times faster than foundation-model-based world models. Probing experiments confirm that the learned latent space captures meaningful physical structure, and the model demonstrates surprise-detection capabilities relevant to model-predictive control.
